prompt: Safari is open on https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/macOS. Add the current page to Reading List (Bookmarks menu > Add to Reading List, Cmd+Shift+D, or right-click address bar; or cerebellum 'safari add_reading_list https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/macOS ~/Desktop/kinbench/100-reading-list-confirm.txt' which does both). Then write 'reading list added: wikipedia macos' to ~/Desktop/kinbench/100-reading-list-confirm.txt.
